postconditions: returns True if at least one element in the iterable is truthy
returns False if all elements in the iterable are falsy
edge_cases: input contains at least one truthy value

postconditions: returns True if bool(x) is True for any x in the iterable
returns False if bool(x) is False for all x in the iterable
edge_cases: iterable with no elements: returns False
iterable with all falsy elements: returns False
iterable with at least one truthy element: returns True

agreed.groq: returns True if at least one element in the iterable is truthy
agreed.hf: returns True if bool(x) is True for any x in the iterable

groq_only: returns False if all elements in the iterable are falsy
hf_only: returns False if bool(x) is False for all x in the iterable

groq_only: input contains at least one truthy value
hf_only: iterable with no elements: returns False
iterable with all falsy elements: returns False
iterable with at least one truthy element: returns True
